Name: BulletAttachParam
Description: Defines parameters relating to the attachment point that fires projectiles.

Fields.Name: Part 1: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to use for this part.

Fields.Name: Part 1: Position Offset - X
Fields.Description: The position offset on the x-axis to use for this part.

Fields.Name: Part 1: Position Offset - Y
Fields.Description: The position offset on the y-axis to use for this part.

Fields.Name: Part 1: Position Offset - Z
Fields.Description: The position offset on the z-axis to use for this part.

Fields.Name: Part 1: Position Offset Accuracy: X
Fields.Description: The accuracy of the position offset on the x-axis for this part.

Fields.Name: Part 1: Position Offset Accuracy: Y
Fields.Description: The accuracy of the position offset on the y-axis for this part.

Fields.Name: Part 1: Position Offset Accuracy: Z
Fields.Description: The accuracy of the position offset on the z-axis for this part.

Fields.Description: The rotation offset on the x-axis to use for this part.
